compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray oval region in Panel E labeled 'NEURONS', containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC neuron glyphs.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded box in Panel E labeled 'INTESTINE', containing the nhr-76 → ATGL → β-oxidation/Fat loss pathway.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle labeled 'ADF' inside the NEURONS region; tph-1 written above it in Panel E.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS region; ser-6 written beside/above it in Panel E.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside the NEURONS region; mod-1 written above it in Panel E. Also arrowhead-marked in Panel C microscopy images.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS region; tbh-1 written below it in Panel E.

genes.snippet: Italic label above the ADF blue triangle in Panel E; also used as transgene/mutant label in Panels A and B.
Italic label beside/above the AWB green triangle in Panel E.
Italic label above the URX yellow hexagon in Panel E; also referenced in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in Panel C and D.
Italic label below the RIC red pentagon in Panel E.
First node in the intestinal pathway text in Panel E; connected by solid pointed arrow to ATGL.
Second node in the intestinal pathway text in Panel E; receives arrow from nhr-76, sends arrow to β-oxidation/Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1) labeled '5-HT' in Panel E; serotonin signaling from ADF to URX.
Solid pointed arrow connecting AWB to ADF region in Panel E; no intermediate molecule labeled. ser-6 in AWB, tph-1 in ADF. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC to AWB labeled 'Oct' (octopamine) along the left vertical edge in Panel E.

Dashed line with T-bar/bar end between URX and RIC in Panel E; direction and exact end type ambiguous — transcription notes 'URX --| RIC (dashed line with arrow/bar to RIC)'. Interpreted as mod-1/URX negatively regulating RIC. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Dashed arrow labeled 'endocrine signal' crossing from URX/NEURONS to INTESTINE in Panel E; small secreted molecule cluster symbols drawn near URX hexagon.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL in the intestinal pathway text in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' endpoint in the intestinal pathway in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
